arts.ttl: 49ers Enterprises discover truth of Leeds United finances as club tops chart
arts.sum: United boasted the most expensive squad last season, having paid £281m for their players. United boasted a fantastic revenue take of £128million for the period, which is approaching double of the previous cycle’s top earners - Norwich City’s £76m in 2022/23.

arts.ttl: Leeds United predicted XI to face Preston
arts.sum: Leeds United play host to Preston on Saturday afternoon looking for back-to-back wins that could consolidate their place in the automatic promotion spots. Another testing weekend awaits with Leeds facing Paul Heckingbottom’s Preston on home soil, looking for another win on the way to hopeful promotion.

arts.ttl: Leeds United given major appointment decision after former PGMOL takes aim at official
arts.sum: The English Football League (EFL) have, seemingly, demoted assistant referee Darren Williams to League One for this weekend following his double Leeds United error in their midweek clash against Middlesbrough. Following his errors in Leeds' game against Middlesbrough, it seems that the assistant referee has been dropped a division.

arts.ttl: Leeds United News: PGMOL chief calls Farke over linesman howlers
arts.sum: Leeds United manager Daniel Farke has shared that he took a phone call with PGMOL manager Kevin Friend over the controversy of two goals being wrongly disallowed against Middlesbrough this week. Daniel Farke confirms PGMOL phone call after Middlesbrough, Leeds United linesman howlers

arts.ttl: Daniel Farke confirms Leeds United injury blow after Pascal Struijk and Daniel James update
arts.sum: However, Leeds have been hit with a huge injury blow ahead of the final stretch with Farke confirming that Struijk won't play again this season. Leeds United boss Daniel Farke has confirmed that Pascal Struijk will miss the rest of the season with a foot injury.

arts.ttl: Gnonto starts: Leeds United team news and predicted XI to face Preston North End
arts.sum: The latest Leeds United team news as Daniel Farke's side gear up to face Preston North End in the Championship. The post Gnonto starts: Leeds United team news and predicted XI to face Preston North End appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Daniel Farke reveals chat with PGMOL after Leeds United offside blunders vs Middlesbrough
arts.sum: Daniel Farke outlined how he had a “very good call” with PGMOL official Kevin Friend regarding the two offside errors made in Leeds United ’s win over Middlesbrough on Tuesday. Farke said after the Middlesbrough win that he would not ask for Williams not to officiate Leeds games again, albeit had already questioned why he was being put on United matches.

arts.ttl: Leeds United News: Struijk’s season over, James ruled out too
arts.sum: The two major questions for Farke’s pre-match press conference on Friday afternoon pertained to the fitness of Pascal Struijk after his foot issue forced him off at Luton Town, and the fresh setback for Dan James, subbed off in the second half after scoring the winner against Middlesbrough. Leeds United team news pre-Preston: Pascal Struijk out for the season, Dan James updates

arts.ttl: Leeds United News: Paul Heckingbottom afraid of fast start
arts.sum: Leeds United are the Championship’s fastest starters this season with the most goals in the early stages of games, and Preston’s Paul Heckingbottom is well aware. Preston boss Paul Heckingbottom well aware of Leeds United’s fast starts this season

arts.ttl: Leeds United v Preston: Farke must axe Piroe after Ramazani stance
arts.sum: Leeds United winger Largie Ramazani hasn’t kicked a ball in April, but has become a major talking point because of his lack of action, with Daniel Farke discussed non-negotiables that are keeping him out of the side. What has Daniel Farke said about Leeds United winger Largie Ramazani?
